copyInstruction: Copy the contents of generated-assets/src into the game project src directory. Runtime paths in src fields will then resolve directly.

pathFields.src: Destination path used by the new per-case content architecture.
pathFields.archiveSrc: Current path relative to the root of this content archive.
pathFields.installTo: Exact copy destination relative to the current game project root.
pathFields.legacyRuntimeUrl: Value for the current game schema; used by personImage or evidence[].data.imageUrl.
